rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible or properly declared in the same annex.
generic_rules: When validating AGREE contracts, resolve type errors by tracing invalid identifiers to their root cause.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within AGREE annexes to avoid 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors.
AGREE annexes should only reference features or properties that are in scope for the component type or implementation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component implementations may use assignments for deployment bindings within their annex.
anti_patterns: Adding new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
